title: ClawTasker agent registration payload
description: Local-only helper contract for agent self-registration so ClawTasker can display name, role, skills, and reporting metadata in the company chart.

id.description: Optional stable agent id. If omitted, ClawTasker slugifies the name.

name.description: Display name shown on roster cards and the organisation chart.

role.description: Human-readable role shown on roster cards and the organisation chart.

specialist.description: Primary specialist label, for example code, research, docs, or ops.

specialists.description: Additional specialist labels for routing and display.

skills.description: Readable skills shown in the roster and used for chart summaries.

core_skills.description: Short specialist-aligned skills list used for chart summaries.

manager.description: Optional manager id, for example orion or a manager lane id.

source.description: Optional source tag, for example mission-control or openclaw-bootstrap.
